channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Rubio says NATO must be re-examined after Spain blocks US operation on Iran
item.description: Marco Rubio said it was “very disappointing” that NATO allies blocked the use of their bases for the US's war on Iran.

item.title: French police make two more arrests over foiled attack on Bank of America
item.description: Prosecutors investigating suspected link to Iran war due to similarities with other recent attempted attacks in Europe.

item.title: Two more UN peacekeepers killed in southern Lebanon: UNIFIL
item.description: At least three UN peacekeepers killed this week as violence surges amid Israel's expanding invasion of southern Lebanon.

item.title: ‘Strait of Hormuz will reopen one way or another’, Rubio tells Al Jazeera
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has told Al Jazeera that the US will not accept Iran’s claim over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Fire contained after missile attack on oil refinery in Israel’s Haifa
item.description: Attack marks second time Oil Refineries facility in northern Israel targeted during US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Heavy rain, floods kill at least 45 people in Afghanistan, Pakistan
item.description: At least 28 people are killed in Afghanistan and 17 in Pakistan after heavy rainfall causes severe flooding.

item.title: Egypt’s president urges Trump to stop war on Iran
item.description: Egypt’s President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi has called on Trump to end the war on Iran.

item.title: Trump threatens to ‘blow up’ desalination plants in Iran if no deal reached
item.description: Legal expert says targeting civilian sites would be 'collective punishment', which is prohibited under laws of war.

item.title: Is the US ready to invade Iran? What Trump’s moves tell us so far
item.description: Seizing strategic islands and destroying Iran's stock of enriched uranium are options the US is considering.

item.title: ‘Loyalty campaign’: Iraqi armed groups in Iran as US talks of ground war
item.description: Fighters from a major Iraqi pro-Iran armed group have entered the country, carrying aid — and a signal of support.
